005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot;
007
008import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.DoNothingAuton;
009import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.feeder.FeederSetForward;
010import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.feeder.FeederSetIdle;
011import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.handoff.HandoffSetForward;
012import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.handoff.HandoffSetIdle;
013import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeDigest;
014import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetIdle;
015import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetIntake;
016import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetOuttake;
017import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.leds.LEDDefaultCommand;
018import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterSetFerry;
019import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterSetManual;
020import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterSetShoot;
021import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveDriveDrive;
022import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveDriveResetRotation;
023import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveDriveXMode;
024import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.driveAligned.SwerveDriveAlignToFerryZone;
025import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.driveAligned.SwerveDriveAlignToHub;
026import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Field;
027import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Ports;
028import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.feeder.Feeder;
029import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.handoff.Handoff;
030import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.intake.Intake;
031import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.leds.LEDController;
032import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.shooter.Shooter;
033import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.swerve.CommandSwerveDrivetrain;
034import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.vision.LimelightVision;
035import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.smartdashboard.SendableChooser;
036import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.smartdashboard.SmartDashboard;
037import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command;
038import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Commands;
039import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.CommandXboxController;
040import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.Trigger;
041import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.sysid.SysIdRoutine.Direction;
042
043/**
044 * <h2>Robot Container Class</h2>
045 * 
046 * This class is where the bulk of the robot should be declared. Since Command-based is a
047 * "declarative" paradigm, very little robot logic should actually be handled in the {@link Robot}
048 * periodic methods (other than the scheduler calls). Instead, the structure of the robot (including
049 * subsystems, commands, and trigger mappings) should be declared here.
050 */
051public class RobotContainer {
052
053    // Gamepads
054    public final CommandXboxController driver = new CommandXboxController(Ports.Gamepad.DRIVER);
055
056    // Subsystem
057    private final Feeder feeder = Feeder.getInstance();
058
059    private final Intake intake = Intake.getInstance();
060
061    private final Shooter shooter = Shooter.getInstance();
062
063    private final CommandSwerveDrivetrain swerve = CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance();
064
065    private final LimelightVision vision = LimelightVision.getInstance();
066
067    private final LEDController leds = LEDController.getInstance();
068
069    private final Handoff handoff = Handoff.getInstance();
070
071    // Autons
072    private static SendableChooser<Command> autonChooser = new SendableChooser<>();
073
074    // Robot container
075
076    /** The container for the robot. Contains subsystems, OI devices, and commands. */
077    public RobotContainer() {
078        swerve.configureAutoBuilder();
079        configureDefaultCommands();
080        configureButtonBindings();
081        configureAutons();
082        SmartDashboard.putData("Field", Field.FIELD2D);
083    }
084
085    /** ************ */
086    /** DEFAULTS ** */
087    /** ************ */
088    private void configureDefaultCommands() {
089        swerve.setDefaultCommand(new SwerveDriveDrive(driver));
090        leds.setDefaultCommand(new LEDDefaultCommand());
091    }
092
093    /***************/
094    /*** BUTTONS ***/
095    /***************/
096
097    /**
098     * This method is used to configure button bindings for controlling the robot.
099   */
100    private void configureButtonBindings() {
101        // Trigger buttons did not work for some reason so I had to do this
102        Trigger leftTrigger = new Trigger(() -> driver.getLeftTriggerAxis() > 0.5);
103        Trigger rightTrigger = new Trigger(() -> driver.getRightTriggerAxis() > 0.5);
104        leftTrigger.onTrue(new IntakeSetIntake());
105        driver.leftBumper().whileTrue(new IntakeSetOuttake());
106        driver.leftBumper().onFalse(new IntakeSetIntake());
107        rightTrigger.onTrue(
108                new SwerveDriveAlignToHub()
109                        .andThen(new SwerveDriveXMode())
110                        .andThen(new ShooterSetShoot())
111                        .andThen(new HandoffSetForward())
112                        .alongWith(new FeederSetForward(), new IntakeDigest()));
113        // Top Left Paddle
114        driver.a().onTrue(new IntakeSetIdle());
115        driver.povUp().onTrue(new SwerveDriveResetRotation());
116        driver
117                .rightBumper()
118                .onTrue(
119                        new SwerveDriveAlignToFerryZone()
120                                .andThen(new SwerveDriveXMode())
121                                .andThen(new ShooterSetFerry())
122                                .andThen(new HandoffSetForward())
123                                .alongWith(new FeederSetForward(), new IntakeDigest()));
124        // Bottom Right Paddle
125        // Manual shooting possibly from in front of the hub
126        driver
127                .y()
128                .onTrue(
129                        new SwerveDriveXMode()
130                                .andThen(new ShooterSetManual())
131                                .andThen(new HandoffSetForward())
132                                .alongWith(new FeederSetForward(), new IntakeDigest()));
133        // Top Right Paddle
134        driver
135                .b()
136                .onTrue(
137                        new HandoffSetIdle()
138                                .alongWith(
139                                        new FeederSetIdle(),
140                                        new IntakeSetIntake(),
141                                        Commands.runOnce(
142                                                () -> new SwerveDriveXMode().cancel())));
143        // Bottom Left Paddle
144        driver.x().whileTrue(new SwerveDriveXMode());
145    }
146
147    /**************/
148    /*** AUTONS ***/
149    /**************/
150
151    /**
152     * This method is used to configure the autonomous commands.
153     */
154     public void configureAutons() {
155        autonChooser.addOption("Do Nothing", new DoNothingAuton());
156        // AutonConfig LBFerry = new AutonConfig("LB Ferry", LBFerry::new,
157        // "LB to N Ferry",
158        // "N to LT Ferry",
159        // "LT Hub Ferry",
160        // "N to Depot Ferry");
161        // LBFerry.register(autonChooser);
162        // AutonConfig RBFerry = new AutonConfig("RB Ferry", RBFerry::new,
163        // "RB to N Ferry",
164        // "N to RT Ferry",
165        // "RT Hub Ferry",
166        // "N to Outpost Ferry");
167        // RBFerry.register(autonChooser);
168        // AutonConfig LBMid = new AutonConfig("LB Mid", LBMid::new,
169        // "LB to N Mid",
170        // "LB Return Mid");
171        // LBMid.register(autonChooser);
172        // AutonConfig LBStraight = new AutonConfig("LB Straight", LBStraight::new,
173        // "LB to N Straight",
174        // "N to LB Straight");
175        // LBStraight.register(autonChooser);
176        // AutonConfig RBStraight = new AutonConfig("RB Straight", RBStraight::new,
177        // "RB to N Straight",
178        // "N to RB Straight");
179        // RBStraight.register(autonChooser);
180        // AutonConfig RBMid = new AutonConfig("RB Mid", RBMid::new,
181        // "RB to N Mid",
182        // "RB Return Mid",
183        // "RB to Outpost Mid");
184        // RBMid.register(autonChooser);
185        // AutonConfig TwoMeterPath = new AutonConfig("Two Meter Path",
186        // TwoMeterPath::new,
187        // "2 meter path");
188        // TwoMeterPath.register(autonChooser);
189        // AutonConfig OutpostOnly = new AutonConfig("Outpost Only", OutpostOnly::new,
190        // "Outpost");
191        // OutpostOnly.register(autonChooser);
192        // AutonConfig RBOuttake = new AutonConfig("RB Outtake", RBOuttake::new,
193        // "RB to N Outtake",
194        // "N to RB Outtake");
195        // RBOuttake.register(autonChooser);
196        // AutonConfig LBOuttake = new AutonConfig("LB Outtake", LBOuttake::new,
197        // "LB to N Outtake",
198        // "N to LB Outtake");
199        // LBOuttake.register(autonChooser);
200        // AutonConfig LBMidlineSweep = new AutonConfig("LB Midline Sweep",
201        // LBMidlineSweep::new,
202        // "LB to N Midline",
203        // "LN Sweep Midline");
204        // LBMidlineSweep.register(autonChooser);
205        // AutonConfig RBMidlineSweep = new AutonConfig("RB Midline Sweep",
206        // RBMidlineSweep::new,
207        // "RB to N Midline",
208        // "RN Sweep Midline");
209        // RBMidlineSweep.register(autonChooser);
210        // AutonConfig LBDisrupt = new AutonConfig("LB Disrupt", LBDisrupt::new,
211        // "LB to CN Disrupt",
212        // "LN Circle Disrupt",
213        // "LN Circle Disrupt",
214        // "LB Disrupt Return");
215        // LBDisrupt.register(autonChooser);
216        // AutonConfig RBDisrupt = new AutonConfig("RB Disrupt", RBDisrupt::new,
217        // "RB to CN Disrupt",
218        // "RN Circle Disrupt",
219        // "RN Circle Disrupt",
220        // "RB Disrupt Return");
221        // RBDisrupt.register(autonChooser);
222        // AutonConfig LT_Disrupt = new AutonConfig("LT Disrupt", LTDisrupt::new,
223        // "LT to N Disrupt",
224        // "LT Circle Disrupt",
225        // "LT Circle Disrupt",
226        // "LT Side Push Disrupt",
227        // "LT Around Disrupt",
228        // "LT Back Push Disrupt");
229        // LT_Disrupt.register(autonChooser);
230        // AutonConfig RT_Disrupt = new AutonConfig("RT Disrupt", RTDisrupt::new,
231        // "RT to N Disrupt",
232        // "RT Circle Disrupt",
233        // "RT Circle Disrupt",
234        // "RT Side Push Disrupt",
235        // "RT Around Disrupt",
236        // "RT Back Push Disrupt");
237        // RT_Disrupt.register(autonChooser);
238        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Dynamic Forwards",
239        // swerve.sysIdDynamic(Direction.kForward));
240        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Dynamic Backwards",
241        // swerve.sysIdDynamic(Direction.kReverse));
242        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Quasi Forwards",
243        // swerve.sysIdQuasistatic(Direction.kForward));
244        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Quasi Backwards",
245        // swerve.sysIdQuasistatic(Direction.kReverse));
246        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Dynamic Forwards",
247        // swerve.sysidRotationDynamic(Direction.kForward));
248        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Dynamic Backwards",
249        // swerve.sysidRotationDynamic(Direction.kReverse));
250        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Quasi Forwards",
251        // swerve.sysidRotationQuasiStatic(Direction.kForward));
252        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Quasi Backwards",
253        // swerve.sysidRotationQuasiStatic(Direction.kReverse));
254        autonChooser.addOption(
255                "Intake Pivot SysID  Quasi Forwards",
256                intake.getIntakeSysIdRoutine().quasistatic(Direction.kForward));
257        autonChooser.addOption(
258                "Intake Pivot SysID  Quasi Reverse",
259                intake.getIntakeSysIdRoutine().quasistatic(Direction.kReverse));
260        autonChooser.addOption(
261                "Intake Pivot SysID  Dynamic Forwards",
262                intake.getIntakeSysIdRoutine().dynamic(Direction.kForward));
263        autonChooser.addOption(
264                "Intake Pivot SysID  Dynamic Reverse",
265                intake.getIntakeSysIdRoutine().dynamic(Direction.kReverse));
266        autonChooser.addOption(
267                "Shooter SysID Quasi Forwards ",
268                shooter.getShooterSysIdRoutine().quasistatic(Direction.kForward));
269        autonChooser.addOption(
270                "Shooter SysID Quasi Reverse ",
271                shooter.getShooterSysIdRoutine().quasistatic(Direction.kReverse));
272        autonChooser.addOption(
273                "Shooter SysID Dynamic Forward ",
274                shooter.getShooterSysIdRoutine().dynamic(Direction.kForward));
275        autonChooser.addOption(
276                "Shooter SysID Dynamic Reverse ",
277                shooter.getShooterSysIdRoutine().dynamic(Direction.kReverse));
278        SmartDashboard.putData("Autonomous", autonChooser);
279    }
280
281    /**
282     * Use this to pass the autonomous command to the main {@link Robot} class.
283     * @return The command to run in autonomous
284     */
285    public Command getAutonomousCommand() {
286        return autonChooser.getSelected();
287    }
288}
